creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

The following line seems wrong: 

RUN_DEPENDS=    ${PREFIX}/lib/perl5/site_perl/Net/Domain.pm:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-N 
et-DNS  

The p5-Net-DNS port does not install Domain.pm: 

mph124:~$ cd /usr/ports/net/p5-Net-DNS/ 
mph124:/usr/ports/net/p5-Net-DNS$ grep Domain pkg/PLIST  
mph124:/usr/ports/net/p5-Net-DNS$  

Can you provide a fix? 
Thanks.
